title: Book Club, Workshops, & Community Events
subtitle: Find connection and growth through community.

sections.title: Therapeutic Book Club
sections.text: This isn't your neighborhood book club (and, hey, we love a neighborhood book club!). While it definitely has a social component, our virtual book club focuses on self-reflection and building and sharing insight.

details.label: Meetings
details.text: Three live meetings, once each month, from 6-7:15 PM EST: March 24th, April 21st, May 19th

items.name: Breathing Room
items.text: Feeling overwhelmed? Could you just use a break, a moment to breathe? Join us for Breathing Room, a free community wellness event designed to help you find calm and clarity through simple, bite-sized mindfulness exercises.
items.footer: This event is open to the public. No pressure to participate beyond your comfort level. Whether you’re new to mindfulness or looking to deepen your practice, you’re welcome.

items.name: Quarterly Networking Lunch
items.text:
Looking to connect with fellow therapists and mental health professionals in Loudoun County? Join us for a relaxed, community-focused quarterly networking lunch. This gathering is a welcoming space for Loudoun-based clinicians to meet, share resources, and build relationships.

Whether you're a seasoned practitioner, recently licensed, or just starting in private practice, you're welcome here. No pressure to present or perform—just come as you are.
